question: What is the color of the yoga mats spread across the wooden floor? A. Red B. Blue C. Orange D. White
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Multiple people are lying on blue yoga mats on a wooden floor, while others sit along the walls near a thick red cylindrical pillar in the foreground. Two large gongs are mounted on a black metal frame in the center of the room, and a wooden cabinet with a mirror stands against the right wall near an orange curtain.
